codeReview.summary: The arc-generation utility successfully creates geopolitical links from both multi-country events and shared entities, but the click-through panel only treats multi-country events as “shared intel.” As a result, valid entity-derived geopolitical arcs can open a panel with zero shared stories, so the interaction does not fully satisfy the feature contract.

issues.description: `buildCountryCoOccurrences()` intentionally creates geopolitical arcs from shared entities across separate country events, but ArcPanel reconstructs `sharedEvents` only from events whose `countries` array contains both endpoints. Entity-derived arcs therefore render as clickable relationships while showing no shared stories in the panel, which breaks the required click-to-inspect behavior for a large class of geopolitical connections.
issues.suggestedFix: Carry geopolitical evidence (`storyIds` or equivalent provenance) through arc selection—especially from the flat-map payload—and have ArcPanel resolve the shared items from that evidence instead of recomputing only multi-country events.

summary: Fail. Geopolitical arcs created from shared entities are not backed by a working shared-stories drilldown in ArcPanel.
